all.en: Thank you for submitting your business loan application last week.
all.zh: 感謝您上週提交企業貸款申請。

all.en: We are writing to provide an update on the review progress.
all.zh: 我們在此告知您本案審核進度更新。

all.en: Your application reference number is L K nine eight seven six.
all.zh: 您的申請參考編號為L K九八七六。

all.en: The requested loan amount is two hundred fifty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 申請貸款金額為二十五萬美元。

all.en: The intended use of funds is equipment expansion and working capital.
all.zh: 資金用途為設備擴充與營運週轉。

all.en: Our credit team has completed the initial document review stage.
all.zh: 本行授信團隊已完成初步文件審查階段。

all.en: All required financial statements were received in good order.
all.zh: 所有必要財務報表均已完整收齊。

all.en: Tax returns for the past three years have been verified.
all.zh: 過去三年之稅務申報資料已驗證完畢。

all.en: Personal guarantees from listed signatories have been validated.
all.zh: 所列簽署人之個人保證已驗證完成。

all.en: The collateral appraisal is currently being conducted by an external partner.
all.zh: 擔保品估價現由外部夥伴執行中。

all.en: We expect appraisal results to be available within ten business days.
all.zh: 估價結果預期於十個營業日內出爐。

all.en: Additional documentation may be requested after appraisal review.
all.zh: 估價審閱後可能要求補件。

all.en: Preliminary indications support a favorable credit decision.
all.zh: 初步跡象顯示授信決定傾向核准。

all.en: Final approval still depends on appraisal and committee sign off.
all.zh: 最終核准仍取決於估價與委員會簽核。

all.en: Proposed interest rates are subject to current market conditions.
all.zh: 建議利率將依當前市場狀況調整。

all.en: The term sheet will outline rate, term, and covenants in detail.
all.zh: 授信條件書將詳述利率、期限與限制條款。

all.en: Closing costs and origination fees will be disclosed before signing.
all.zh: 成交費用與開辦費將於簽約前揭露。

all.en: Funds disbursement typically occurs within five days of execution.
all.zh: 撥款通常於簽約後五日內辦理。

all.en: Please keep your contact information current for timely updates.
all.zh: 請維持聯絡資訊更新以便即時通知。

all.en: Your dedicated relationship manager remains available for questions.
all.zh: 專屬關係經理可隨時回應您的疑問。

all.en: We will issue another status update by the end of next week.
all.zh: 我們將於下週週末前再次發送進度通知。

all.en: Thank you for choosing our institution for your financing needs.
all.zh: 感謝您選擇本行作為您融資需求之合作夥伴。
